title: Construction Blocks
description: Adds Lots of new blocks, items, and tools!
body:
Construction blocks add tons of new blocks to use for your buildings. Below you can find all the currently added blocks, items, and tools! There are many new blocks and features coming! Check out the wiki to get more info on what each block/item does and how to obtain it. Note that some blocks may not be obtainable in survival, ie gypsum dust.

## NOTE:
This mod is still in development. Some features may not be fully implemented.

## Loaders

- [Bedrock](https://mcpedl.com/construction-addon/)
- **Forge**

## Blocks
- nail
- nailed
- cone post
- cone barrel
- caution block powder
- gypsum
- rusty iron block
- sea lantern off
 -US outlet
- UK outlet
- us switch

### Beams
- anvil beam
- diamond beam
- emerald beam
- gold beam
- iron beam
- netherite beam
- rusty iron beam

### Caution Blocks
- caution block
- caution block slab
- caution block stairs
- caution block wall
- caution block button

### Misc
- bookshelf (7 wood types)
- celingtile (all 16 colors)
- planks (all 16 colors)
- yellow concrete pillar (all 16 colors)
- concrete large bricks (all 16 colors)
- concrete small bricks (all 16 colors)
- scaffolding (all 8 wood types)
- bricks (all 16 colors)
- brick stairs (all 16 colors)
- brick slab (all 16 colors)
- brick wall (all 16 colors)
- aged bricks (all 16 colors)
- aged brick stairs (all 16 colors)
- aged brick slab (all 16 colors)
- aged brick wall (all 16 colors)
- redstone lamp (all 16 colors, all redstone compatable)
- paper block (all 16 colors) -smooth planks (all 8 wood types)
- polished planks (all 8 wood types)

## Items & Tools

- golden hammer

### Dyed Paper

### Misc

- sandpaper
- wet sandpaper

## FAQ
### Can I add this to my mod pack?
Sure, as long as you give proper credit and follow the license.

### Are you going to downgrade to older versions (ie; 1.15, 1.12, 1.8)?
I will if there is enough demand for a certain version and I have time to.

## Maven
```gradle
dependencies {
    modImplementation "maven.modrinth:construction-blocks:forge-${project.const_version}"
}
```
[More Information](https://docs.modrinth.com/docs/tutorials/maven/)
